name: Hamburgers Diane
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, trim and slice the mushrooms.
2. Melt margarine in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, garlic, onion, and mushrooms to the skillet. Cook and stir for 2 minutes. Remove from heat.
4. Mix meat, salt, and pepper together.
5. Shape the mixture into 4 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
6. Push mushroom-onion mixture to one side of the skillet.
7. Cook the patties over medium-high heat, turning once, until desired doneness is reached (about 10 minutes).
8. Serve with the mushroom-onion mixture spooned over the patties.
